title: papaver orientale var. lateritium
intro: Papaver orientale var. lateritium, also known as the Oriental Poppy 'Lateritium', is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Papaver orientale species, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and striking foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from its alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Papaver orientale var. lateritium include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
